breaches_details.details: Canva, an Australian graphic design and publishing company, announced that it had suffered a data breach in 2019. An unauthorized third-party had gained access to certain data stored on its systems, potentially affecting the personal information of over 137 million users. The exposed data includes customers' names, email addresses, and hashed passwords.

Verifications.io, a comprehensive email verification service, suffered a severe data breach in 2019 that compromised a vast array of personal user data. The exposed data included email addresses, phone numbers, dates of birth, and other personal details, which presented a considerable privacy and security risk to the affected users.
breaches_details.xposed_data: Email addresses;Names;Dates of birth;Genders;Geographic locations;Phone numbers;Physical addresses

breaches_details.details: LinkedIn, the popular professional networking site, suffered a data breach in 2012,  in which hackers obtained user data including email addresses and hashed passwords. The breach reportedly impacted over 167 million user accounts. In 2016, it was discovered that the compromised data was being sold on the dark web. Following the discovery, LinkedIn forced a password reset for all impacted accounts and implemented new security measures to prevent future breaches.

details.about:
• Certified PRINCE2 Practitioner + Project Management Professional (PMP).
• Experience with ITIL Methodology.
• Proven supervisory and organisational skills in projects, team leadership and computer support management.
• 25 years of experience on numerous IT projects including: IT infrastructure projects, real-time systems in railways control centers, Disaster Recovery (DR) solutions.
• Excellent analytical and document drafting skills: Ability to gather, analyse and evaluate facts and to present findings in concise structured reports. 
• Experience across diverse sectors: Banking, Transport, Energy.
• Extensive experience on Microsoft and Solaris environments.
• Methodical and work perfectionist.
• Identified with the corporate customer-service culture.
• Main Infrastructure-Application Management skills: Incident/Change/Problem management, writing functional/operational instructions, production follow up.
• Main Team Management skills: Team coordination, Team leadership, Deployment coordination.

positions.company: Sodexo Benefits and Rewards Services · Freelance

positions.jobDescription:
Project description:
• Migration infrastructure project where recently purchased sites/plants from old former company (Cargill) were migrated and onboarded to the infrastructure, standards and requirements of the new company (Boortmalt).

Responsibilities:
• Manage project plan, timescales and delivery milestones.
• Manage the project’s communications with stakeholders, management and project team working onsite and remotely.
• Manage and coordinate end-to-end the preparation, roll-out and after care phase of the project to successfully hand over the deliverables to day-to-day operations team(s).
• Report periodically about project status to Project Lead keeping updated risk and issue logs.

Project description:
• Mailbox migration from Exchange On-prem to On-Line (7000 mailboxes located in same datacenter and including Enterprise Vault data).
• Microsoft Exchange, Veritas Enterprise Vault, Quadrotech Archive Shuttle 

Responsibilities:
• Perform migration following and refining the process initially defined in a previous Pilot project.
• Developing detailed migration plan and schedule with Borealis PM counterpart.
• Coordinating with customer IT representative/counterparts.
• Liaising between customer and Fujitsu offshoring teams (Exchange Architect/migration team at Kazan, Service Desk at Lisbon and Local support)
• Controlling budget, scope and project plan, detecting deviations and ensuring project is kept under control.
• Reporting periodically about project status to Service Delivery Manager and keeping updated risk and issue logs.
